surfaces.atmosphere: .ds page wash (cool-mist) + per-section cool-mist (lab-hero) / line-field (lab-bento) — reuses bg-cool-mist / bg-line-field grammar

ds_light_card_system.note: Applied by the .ds scope, not standalone bg primitives. Pairs with the prefix-free section barrel (manifest.json#consumption_api).

text_contrast_rule: design-system.md: accent lens gradient (--lens, full-saturation linear) is NOT allowed as a full background behind content. Allowed behind UI: low-opacity radial / --lens-soft / halo. Lens text use = grad-word text-clip only. Also memory no-photo-bg-behind-text: photos never directly under text; full-bleed scenes = generated CSS; photos only in container slots or scrim-darkened.

backgrounds.name: .band / .band.soft / .band.ink
backgrounds.implementation: CSS class
backgrounds.text_contrast_rules: surface tokens carry AA fg pairs

backgrounds.name: --lens (linear)
backgrounds.implementation: CSS var
backgrounds.text_contrast_rules: NOT allowed as full content bg; OK as text-clip / signs / progress

backgrounds.name: --lens-soft (low-opacity)
backgrounds.implementation: CSS var
backgrounds.text_contrast_rules: the ALLOWED form behind UI (icon tiles, media-ph, feature tiles)

backgrounds.name: --lens-deep (135deg)
backgrounds.implementation: CSS var
backgrounds.text_contrast_rules: low-glare fills on dark

backgrounds.name: --ink-grad (160deg)
backgrounds.implementation: CSS var

backgrounds.name: --grad-cta (90deg)
backgrounds.implementation: CSS var (button fill)
backgrounds.text_contrast_rules: white text on fill

backgrounds.name: --fire (118deg)
backgrounds.implementation: CSS var + bg-size anim
backgrounds.text_contrast_rules: Workflow title reveal only; NEVER inside product UI (DS rule)

backgrounds.name: dot-grid texture
backgrounds.implementation: radial-gradient + mask

backgrounds.name: line/grid pattern
backgrounds.implementation: dual linear-gradient + ellipse mask

backgrounds.name: diagonal hatch
backgrounds.implementation: repeating-linear-gradient 45deg

backgrounds.name: image/photo backgrounds
backgrounds.implementation: CSS background-image webp
backgrounds.text_contrast_rules: no-photo-bg-behind-text; container slots or scrim-darkened only

backgrounds.name: scrim / legibility overlays
backgrounds.implementation: layered linear/radial gradients
backgrounds.text_contrast_rules: scrim when video plays; multi-stop ramps for AA

backgrounds.name: 3D UnicornScene halo/glow
backgrounds.implementation: WebGL three + r3f + postprocessing
backgrounds.text_contrast_rules: aria-hidden scene

backgrounds.name: Ink Ambient Glow
backgrounds.implementation: CSS: .bg-ink-ambient-glow on .band.ink + aria-hidden .__layer child (two low-opacity radial-gradients over --ink-grad); no WebGL. REFACTORED: secondary radial --aqua -> --cyan (no teal/green in atmospherics)
backgrounds.intensity: low (peak composited opacity <=0.18; core 78% 18%, away from text column)
backgrounds.overflow_risk: none (inset:0, overflow:hidden, no vw / no negative margin)
backgrounds.text_contrast_rules: text-safe on --fg-on-dark; content z-index:1 above aria-hidden layer; no --lens full bg

consumption_readiness.browser_qa: run (:3005 /dev/visual-lab; overflow 0 @375/1280; console clean; no aqua confirmed by computed style)

backgrounds.name: Neutral surfaces
backgrounds.implementation: surface-token registration; not separate primitives. light=.band(--bg) soft=.band.soft(--bg-soft) ink=.band.ink(--bg-ink/--fg-on-dark). Ink should pair with bg-ink-ambient-glow, never ship flat #000.

backgrounds.name: Cool Mist
backgrounds.implementation: aria-hidden .bg-cool-mist__layer: faint cyan top-right + lavender bottom-left radials over soft/light; all stops <=0.09
backgrounds.intensity: very-low (<=0.09; no visible tint band; no --aqua)
backgrounds.text_contrast_rules: below tint-band threshold; content z-index:1

consumption_readiness.browser_qa: run (computed style violet/cyan/lavender; no aqua; overflow 0; mobile 1 radial)

backgrounds.name: Violet Halo
backgrounds.implementation: aria-hidden .bg-violet-halo__layer: single masked violet->lavender radial; ink variant (.band.ink / --ink) pushes violet 12%->16%
backgrounds.text_contrast_rules: single core off-text; content z-index:1

backgrounds.name: Dot Grid
backgrounds.implementation: contained masked layer: radial dots (--fg @8% / white @6% on ink) 22px + ellipse mask

consumption_readiness.browser_qa: run (screenshot ink: white dots, text crisp)

backgrounds.name: Line Field
backgrounds.implementation: contained masked layer: dual 42px grid (--violet @9% verticals, --cyan @8% horizontals) + ellipse mask

consumption_readiness.browser_qa: run (screenshot light: subtle dissolved grid, text readable)

backgrounds.name: Concentric Rings
backgrounds.implementation: contained masked layer: repeating-radial-gradient --violet @6%, ring pitch 36px (no moire) + ellipse mask

consumption_readiness.browser_qa: run (screenshot soft: faint rings, text readable)

backgrounds.name: Media Scrim
backgrounds.implementation: pointer-safe overlay (.bg-media-scrim / --ink) inside media containers; multi-stop legibility gradient; text z-index above
backgrounds.text_contrast_rules: MANDATORY scrim under text over photo/video; no raw media under text

backgrounds.name: Ink Floor Glow
backgrounds.implementation: CSS: .bg-ink-floor-glow + aria-hidden .__layer child; single violet radial anchored at the BOTTOM (radial-gradient ellipse 50% 60% at 50% 110%, rgba(108,76,241,.16) 0%, transparent 70%). Distinct from bg-ink-ambient-glow (top/centre core) by position — light-under-the-door floor wash.
backgrounds.intensity: low (peak composited opacity <=0.18; bottom-anchored, away from body text)
backgrounds.text_contrast_rules: text-safe on --fg-on-dark; content z-index:1 above aria-hidden layer; STRICTLY 2 glow points per page (hero + CTA)

consumption_readiness.browser_qa: run (:3005 /dev/visual-lab; bottom-anchored violet radial confirmed; parent #000; overflow 0 @375/1440)

backgrounds.name: Nebula Layers
backgrounds.implementation: Surface registration for the dark Nebula base: .bg-nebula-layers{background:var(--nebula-base);color:var(--nebula-fg)} + --raised(--nebula-layer1) / --float(--nebula-layer2); scoped .sub/p -> --nebula-fg-2. Warm ultra-dark, NOT flat #000.
backgrounds.text_contrast_rules: fg #f0eeff on #0a0509 >=AA; body uses --nebula-fg-2 #c8c4f0; scoped so tint never leaks onto non-nebula surfaces

consumption_readiness.browser_qa: run (base rgb(10,5,9), layer1 rgb(15,11,28), fg rgb(240,238,255) confirmed)

backgrounds.name: Nebula Blob
backgrounds.implementation: aria-hidden .bg-nebula-blob__layer: dual radial (violet ellipse 80% 55% at 18% 48% rgba(108,76,241,.22); cyan ellipse 60% 45% at 86% 58% rgba(46,197,232,.14)). Intensity rides ScrollFX --pin: opacity:calc(.55 + .45*var(--pin,0)) (no new runtime). Mobile <600px drops 2nd radial.
backgrounds.text_contrast_rules: blobs off the text column; content z-index:1

consumption_readiness.browser_qa: run (dual radial @desktop, 1 @mobile<600; opacity calc(.55+.45*--pin) base .55; overflow 0)

backgrounds.name: Tinted Glass
backgrounds.implementation: Violet-tinted glass utility on a container: background rgba(123,92,246,.08); border 1px rgba(169,155,255,.20); backdrop-filter blur(16px) saturate(1.4) (unitless saturate + unprefixed only -> Lightning CSS keeps both prefixes); inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(123,92,246,.10). Modifier --accent: glowing border (box-shadow 0 0 16px -4px rgba(123,92,246,.35)).
backgrounds.text_contrast_rules: glass card container; place text at >= container z

consumption_readiness.browser_qa: run (backdrop-filter blur(16px) saturate(1.4) compiled with BOTH -webkit- + standard; --accent violet box-shadow confirmed)

backgrounds.name: Plain Glass
backgrounds.implementation: Neutral 6% glass utility for dark surfaces: background rgba(255,255,255,.06); border .5px rgba(255,255,255,.10); backdrop-filter blur(8px) (unprefixed only -> autoprefixed); border-radius inherit. No tint — structure only.
backgrounds.text_contrast_rules: neutral container; no own color

consumption_readiness.browser_qa: run (backdrop-filter blur(8px) compiled with both prefixes)

backgrounds.name: Nebula Video Scrim
backgrounds.implementation: Twin media overlay: ::before readability ramp linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(10,5,9,.15), rgba(10,5,9,.80)) NO blend; SEPARATE ::after color-leak radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 65%, rgba(123,92,246,.14) 0%, transparent 52%) with mix-blend-mode:screen ONLY on ::after. Both pointer-events:none; text must sit z-index:2.
backgrounds.text_contrast_rules: MANDATORY scrim under text over video; readability layer is blend-free so legibility never depends on the color leak

consumption_readiness.browser_qa: run (::after mix-blend-mode screen, ::before normal — confirmed separately)

backgrounds.name: Lens Gradient Heading
backgrounds.implementation: Brand gradient TEXT clip: background linear-gradient(118deg, #f0eeff 0%, #a99bff 45%, #2ec5e8 100%); background-clip:text; -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent. Text-clip only (like --lens) — NOT a content background.
backgrounds.text_contrast_rules: H1 hero / statement ONLY — never body or sub-headings (gradient-clipped text hurts small-size legibility)

backgrounds.name: bg-through-gradient-flip
backgrounds.implementation: two position:fixed full-viewport layers behind transparent sections (continuous through-background, light->dark flip)

layers.light: linear-gradient(132deg, color-mix(in oklab,var(--violet) 18%,var(--bg-soft)) 0%, var(--bg-soft) 48%, color-mix(in oklab,var(--cyan) 14%,var(--bg-soft)) 100%)  /* = .lab-hero__bg verbatim */
layers.dark: linear-gradient(312deg, color-mix(in oklab,var(--violet) 42%,var(--ink)) 0%, var(--ink) 50%, color-mix(in oklab,var(--cyan) 26%,var(--ink)) 100%)  /* = .lab-hero.ink .lab-hero__bg reversed (132->312) */

backgrounds.tokens_note: color-mix(in oklab,...) — OK; NOT raw oklab()/oklch() stops (Lightning CSS drops those silently)
backgrounds.light_dark: flips light->dark across scroll (dark layer opacity = var(--pin))
backgrounds.text_contrast_rules: text --fg over light end -> --fg-on-dark over dark end (sections carry on-dark flag in dark zone)
backgrounds.reduced_motion: dark layer opacity:1 (static dark), content legible

surface_ownership.note: continuous through-bg needs transparent sections; DS sections paint opaque .band (same blocker as tr-overlap-bridge)

backgrounds.approved: user-approved recipe 2026-06-23 (save into library; productionization via component-forge = follow-up)

restrictions: needs transparent-surface API on DS sections first

tokens_added_batch4.note: dark-theme tokens registered in globals.css :root (visual-layer-forge batch 4)
